mapper.select:
select * from department_info
and (name like concat('%', #{name}, '%') or code like concat('%', #{name}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
order by sort desc, id desc
select * from department_info where status = 1 order by sort desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into department_info(name, code, description, location, phone, sort, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{location}, #{phone}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
